assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 58 of claude-md-result.md contains '## Security Configuration' as a level-2 heading.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 60-66 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Product Lifecycle' with all 5 fields: '- Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle', '- Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT', '- Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200', '- Component label pattern: pscomponent:', '- VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 68-72 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Version Streams' with a table. Row on line 72 shows: '| 2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md |'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 74-79 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Source Repositories' with a table having two entries: '| backend | https://github.com/example/backend |' and '| frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui |'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md contains: '## Repository Registry' (line 20) with a table, '## Jira Configuration' (line 27) with all fields, '## Code Intelligence' (line 35) with '### Limitations' subsection (line 48), and '## Bug Configuration' (line 52) with all fields.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 52-56 of claude-md-result.md contain '## Bug Configuration' with: '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 37-38 of discovery-log.md state: 'No existing Security Configuration found. User accepted when asked whether to enable security triage. Security Configuration was opted in.' Lines 42-47 document the Product Lifecycle fields collected from the user, lines 49-52 document Version Streams, and lines 54-58 document Source Repositories.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md documents all sections as newly added: '### Added: `# Project Configuration`' (line 5), '### Added: `## Repository Registry`' (line 9), '### Added: `## Jira Configuration`' (line 18), '### Added: `## Code Intelligence`' (line 28), '### Added: `## Bug Configuration`' (line 35), '### Added: `## Security Configuration`' (line 43). All use 'Added:' prefix confirming they were newly added.
